title: Snowed In
description: Put snow inside other blocks. Also adds some pretty snow effects
body:
# Snowed In A mod that lets you do more with snow :3 This mod lets you put snow layers in plenty of different blocks, using only block states to do so. Some blocks also get pretty little overlays when snowed in. This mod also should support most modded blocks extending vanilla classes. It also features explicit support for: - Immersive Wethering - Spelunkery - Twigs - LambdaBetterGrass (Better snow connects to snowed-in blocks correctly) Please request more mods in issues if you want explicit support.
**Snowy fences get a special texture** ![Cows with snowy fence :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jr28V8kk/images/ec660cf07cfb1b415775536d8da6f9782ed49ce5.png) **Snowy blocks make overlays on ALL blocks** ![Snowy boulder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jr28V8kk/images/b248cbcd60f4794436ba7b69e391df7c8361dd14.png)
